scripts.publish:lib: ng build ng-mapcn --configuration production && cd dist/ng-mapcn && npm publish --tag beta --access public
scripts.build-ui-dev: node -e "const v = require('./projects/ng-mapcn/package.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('ng cache clean && ng build ng-mapcn && cd dist/ng-mapcn && npm pack && cd ../.. && npm i ./dist/ng-mapcn/ng-mapcn-' + v + '.tgz -f && ng serve demo', { stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.build-ui-dev-clean: node -e "const v = require('./projects/ng-mapcn/package.json').version; const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const fs = require('fs'); if (process.platform === 'win32') { try { execSync('powershell -Command \"if (Test-Path .angular) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .angular }; if (Test-Path dist) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force dist }\"', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch(e) {} } else { try { execSync('rm -rf .angular dist', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch(e) {} } execSync('ng cache clean && ng build ng-mapcn && cd dist/ng-mapcn && npm pack && cd ../.. && npm i ./dist/ng-mapcn/ng-mapcn-' + v + '.tgz -f && ng serve demo', { stdio: 'inherit' })"
